subject: Reference: project-ideas.md is your primary source of truth
body:
Hey Hephaestus — just so you know, Konan keeps all his project ideas in ~/pantheon/project-ideas.md. That file is THE list of what needs building. Whenever Konan tells me a new idea, I add it there. You should read it frequently to know what's on the roadmap.

Currently high-priority for you:
- Pantheon Plugin / God SDK (the manifest format, packaging system)
- Pantheon Bridge (this messaging system we're using right now)

If Konan asks you to work on something, refer to that file for context.
